zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre於1202年6月2日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，她的父親Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI30歲，母親Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople28歲。她於大約1217年與Bouchard d'Avesnes在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1280年2月10日在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年77歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre于1202年6月2日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯时，她的父亲Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI30岁，母亲Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople28岁。她于大约1217年与Bouchard d'Avesnes在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯艾維斯斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1280年2月10日在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特享年77岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre was born on 2 June 1202, in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI, was 30 and her mother, Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, was 28. She married Bouchard d'Avesnes about 1217, in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 10 February 1280, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 77, and was buried in Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre est née le 2 juin 1202, à Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Bouchard d'Avesnes environ 1217, à Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1280, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre am 2. Juni 1202 in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI 30 und ihre Mutter Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople 28. Sie hat um 1217 in Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Bouchard d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1280 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien und wurde in Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre è nata il il 2 giugno 1202 nel Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Bouchard d'Avesnes circa 1217, nel Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 10 febbraio 1280, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandreが1202年6月2日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードベレンシエンスで生まれた時，父Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VIは30歳，母Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinopleは28歳であった。約1217年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスエイベスンスでBouchard d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1280年2月10日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで77歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードモータグネ-ドウ-ノードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre(이)가 1202년 6월 2일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1217년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 에베스네스에서 Bouchard d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 2월 10일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 모르타그니-드-노르드에 묻혔다.

mn.2 June 1202–10 februari 1280: 1202 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 2–1280 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 10

pt.2 June 1202–10 februari 1280: 2 de junho de 1202–10 de fevereiro de 1280
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre nasceu em 2 de junho de 1202, em Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Bouchard d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1217, em Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1280, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre родилась 2 июня 1202 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bouchard d'Avesnes около 1217 г. в местности авеснесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 10 февраля 1280 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности мортагне-ду-норд, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.2 June 1202–10 februari 1280: 2 de junio de 1202–10 de febrero de 1280
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre nació el 2 de junio de 1202, en Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Empereur latin de Constantinople Baudouin de Hainaut VI, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marie de Champagne Queen of Constantinople, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Bouchard d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1217, en Avesnes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1280, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
